alerts.source: FWGS store pickup inventory API browser-assisted collector
alerts.storeAddress: The Campus, 100 Willowbrook Lane, Ste 108, West Chester, PA, 19382
alerts.inventorySemantics: FWGS browser/CDP collection uses the Oracle Commerce store-location endpoint plus /ccstorex/custom/v1/b2b/get-inventory to collect pickup quantity by SKU and store. alerts.source: NC ABC Stock Shipped Data
alerts.inventorySemantics: NC is fragmented by local ABC boards. Wake can expose store-level inventory, NC Stock Shipped Data gives board-level shipment evidence, and the NC warehouse page is statewide early-warning radar. Board/warehouse signals are useful planning intelligence but must not be described as exact shelf inventory.
alerts.reason: Changed signal for Buffalo Trace Bourbon in NC: quantity: 12 → 480; price: 22.95 → 32.95.
alerts.evidence: NC ABC Stock Shipped Data reports 480 unit(s) of Buffalo Trace KY Straight Bourbon .75L shipped to Triad Municipal ABC Board. This is board-level shipment intelligence from the official state feed; it does not prove a specific store shelf quantity. NC ABC also flags this NC Code in its product-control spreadsheet (controlled distribution), which helps distinguish ordinary replenishment from high-demand controlled-product movement.
